# openai_project_data_retention (Resource)

Manage project data retention controls.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_project_data_retention" "example" {
  project_id = "proj_123"
  type       = "organization_default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) project id
- `type` (String) type

### Read-Only

- `object` (String) object
